opportunities.name: AI Agent Workflow QA Service

opportunities.name: YouTube Analytics API Integration Service

marketData.targetAudience: Mid-size YouTubers (100K-5M subs), MCNs, content strategists

opportunities.name: Minecraft Map Commission Marketplace

marketData.targetAudience: Minecraft YouTubers (100K+ subs), professional Minecraft builders, map artists

opportunities.name: AI Coding Agent Benchmarking Service
opportunities.description: Independent benchmarking service for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, etc.). Provides standardized test results, productivity metrics, and ROI analysis for engineering teams choosing tools. Monthly benchmark reports with data-driven recommendations.
opportunities.nextStep: Define 5 standardized coding tasks for benchmark suite (build API, refactor legacy, debug, etc.)

marketData.problem: Engineering teams lack independent data to choose between 20+ AI coding tools; vendor claims are biased
marketData.targetAudience: Engineering managers at 50-500 person companies, CTOs making tool purchasing decisions
marketData.differentiation: Independent testing, standardized metrics, continuous updates, focus on mid-market ($50-500M companies underserved)

opportunities.validationSignal: Steven's 30-day comparison video (trend score 120) proves audience demand for this data; can productize the methodology

opportunities.name: AI-Generated Video Editing Service
opportunities.description: White-label video editing service for YouTube creators using AI-generated assets (Higgsfield, Midjourney, Runway) + trained foreign editors ($250/project). Targets creators who want AI-enhanced videos but lack in-house editing talent.
opportunities.nextStep: Hire and train 2-3 editors via Upwork, complete Steven's first project as case study

marketData.problem: Most creators can't afford US editors ($50-150/hr), don't have time to learn AI tools, struggle with quality foreign editors
marketData.targetAudience: Mid-size YouTubers (50K-500K subs), content studios scaling production, AI-curious creators
marketData.differentiation: Trained foreign editors ($250/project) + AI asset generation workflow + proven quality (Steven's videos as portfolio)

opportunities.validationSignal: Steven scaling from 1 video/week to 2-3/week by hiring foreign editors - same pain point affects thousands of creators
opportunities.linkedProject: stevensongirl editor recruitment (Upwork account active, test project ready)

opportunities.name: SeeDream 2 - Storyboard-Based Video Generation Tool Evaluation
opportunities.description: Evaluate SeeDream 2 for storyboard-to-video generation to reduce editor workload on stevensongirl channel. Could cut editing time tremendously by automating shot generation from narrative outlines.
opportunities.nextStep: Research SeeDream 2 capabilities, test with Ice Dragon storyboard, compare vs Higgsfield/Runway

marketData.problem: Editor workload for shot generation is time-consuming (8-12 hours/video)
marketData.differentiation: Storyboard input → video output automation
marketData.validationSignal: Steven's directive: 'If seedream 2 can work with storyboards, this could cut down editing time tremendously'

opportunities.name: AI Agent Production Patterns Consulting
opportunities.description: Consulting service helping companies implement production-grade AI agent workflows using OpenAI's Skills+Shell+Compaction patterns. Focus on routing logic, negative examples, template-driven skills, and workflow SOPs. Based on proven patterns from OpenAI blog + Glean case study (73% → 85% accuracy).
opportunities.nextStep: Create case study from Nox agent improvements (HEARTBEAT.md skill-ification, template extraction)

marketData.tam: AI agent consulting market subset of $216B AI agent market by 2030
marketData.problem: Companies struggle to productionize AI agents - most POCs fail at scale due to lack of workflow patterns, quality inconsistencies, context management issues
marketData.targetAudience: AI startups (Series A-B), enterprise AI teams, companies moving from POC to production
marketData.differentiation: Agent-native expertise with OpenAI production patterns, proven workflows (Glean +12% accuracy, 18% faster TTFT), skill-based SOPs, template systems
marketData.validationSignal: OpenAI published production patterns Feb 2026 after seeing enterprise struggle with reliability - validates market pain

validationSource.caseStudy: Glean improved accuracy 73% → 85% (+12 pts) and TTFT -18.1% using skills-based workflow
validationSource.stevenDirective: Feb 12 2026 - 'Read this for me and step your game up' (quality standards directive)

implementationPlan: Phase 1: Document current Nox agent patterns as case study
Phase 2: Skill-ify HEARTBEAT.md with templates + routing logic + negative examples
Phase 3: Create workshop materials (skills audit, workflow mapping, template extraction)
Phase 4: Reach out to 5 AI startups in network for pilot consulting
Phase 5: Package as Agent Reliability Audit service ($5K fixed price)
deliverables: Skills-based SOP implementation (routing logic + negative examples)

opportunities.name: AI Infrastructure Cost Optimization Tool
opportunities.description: Dashboard tool for tracking and optimizing AI service costs (OpenAI, Higgsfield, Runway, etc.). Real-time spend monitoring, usage analytics, and cost-saving recommendations. Addresses pain point: 'It was hard to understand our cloud costs, so we built our own tool' - validated by Scamall Teoir launch.
opportunities.nextStep: Survey 5 AI-heavy creators to validate cost tracking pain point; prototype dashboard for Steven's own usage

marketData.catalyst: X.com intelligence Feb 13: Multiple creators expressing frustration with AI service cost tracking
marketData.validationSignal: Direct quote from founder: 'It was hard to understand our cloud costs, so we built our own tool. Saving us $$$' - Scamall Teoir
marketData.targetAudience: AI-heavy creators, indie developers using multiple AI APIs, small studios
marketData.problem: No unified view of AI service spend across OpenAI, Anthropic, Runway, Higgsfield, Midjourney, etc.
marketData.differentiation: AI-specific cost categories (image gen, video gen, text, embeddings), per-project cost tracking, budget alerts across multiple providers

Competition from existing cloud cost tools expanding to AI

opportunities.name: Autonomous AI SDR Agency
opportunities.description: Done-for-you autonomous sales development representative (SDR) service using AI agents. Handles prospecting, outreach, lead qualification, and appointment setting 24/7. Targets B2B SaaS companies spending $50K-150K annually per human SDR.
opportunities.nextStep: Build demo AI SDR for one niche (AI tools market), validate with 3 B2B SaaS companies

marketData.catalyst: AI agent market exploding - Anthropic raising $20B at $350B valuation, Perplexity at $9B (Feb 2026)
marketData.validationSignal: 15 profitable AI agent startup ideas validated by Presta research; SDR replacement is top opportunity
marketData.targetAudience: B2B SaaS companies (5-20 SDR teams), professional services firms, enterprise software vendors
marketData.painPoint: Human SDRs cost $50K-150K/year each, have availability constraints, inconsistent quality, high turnover
marketData.differentiation: AI-native workflow with 70-80% cost reduction vs human SDRs, 24/7 operation, consistent quality, instant scaling
marketData.businessModel: Per-seat monthly subscription ($2000-5000/month) with tiered features based on volume and integration complexity

financials.targetMetrics: Match or exceed human SDR meeting booking rates within 30-day pilot

implementationPlan: Phase 1: Build AI SDR agent with CRM/email/LinkedIn integration (2 weeks)
Phase 2: Train on one vertical - AI tools/software companies (1 week)
Phase 3: Run parallel pilot with 3 B2B SaaS companies (30 days)
Phase 4: Document ROI case studies and testimonials
Phase 5: Scale to additional verticals (professional services, healthcare tech)
researchSources: The Motley Fool - Top 8 AI Start-ups in 2026 (Feb 2026)
